title: Image To Image Professional Profile Avatar
sourceTitle: Image To Image Professional Profile Avatar With Name AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image professional profile avatar transformation for adult graduate student from an uploaded selfie, natural friendly expression, dark hair, clean facial identity preserved, with clean name-and-role display. Subject: The uploaded selfie identity is preserved: real facial features, face shape, hairstyle, and recognizable adult identity remain intact while the person becomes a front-facing professional profile avatar wearing dark blazer, white shirt, optional simple tie, minimal accessories. Scene: Pure white or light gray studio background with even light, clean professional homepage-avatar presentation, and a simple lower information area for Xiaotong Yang and Graduate Student in Education. Composition: Fixed 4:5 portrait avatar layout: front-facing head-and-shoulders crop, natural friendly eye contact, clean upper portrait area, and a minimal white information strip at the bottom with name on the first line and role on the second line. Signature Elements: Uploaded selfie identity preserved, adult graduate student from an uploaded selfie, natural friendly expression, dark hair, clean facial identity preserved, dark blazer, white shirt, optional simple tie, minimal accessories, front-facing professional expression, clean white or light gray background, bottom information strip, Xiaotong Yang, and Graduate Student in Education. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: White and light gray background, dark formal wardrobe tones, clean white shirt accents, natural skin tones, dark readable text, and restrained neutral contrast. Lighting: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Camera: Straight-on portrait camera, natural head-and-shoulders framing, slight professional retouch only, and preserved identity proportions. Typography: Xiaotong Yang appears as the large readable first line in the lower white information area; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
